worker.objective: Implement a backend feature according to {{requirement}} within {{scope}}. Deliver working API endpoints, database operations, business logic, and mark all agent output as generated.
instructions: Read and follow the requirement or spec ({{requirement}}); do not modify files outside {{scope}} unless the requirement explicitly includes them.
Implement API endpoints, database models/migrations, services, and business logic as specified; preserve existing patterns and conventions in the codebase.
Handle errors gracefully and add appropriate validation for inputs.
Write or update tests if the codebase has existing test patterns.

params.requirement: Describe the backend feature: e.g. new API endpoint, database model, service, or business logic.

agent-backend.objective: Confirm scope: API endpoints, database models, services, and dependencies from the requirement.
Implement backend logic: API routes, database operations, services; test endpoints to verify.
Add input validation, error handling, and edge case coverage.
Report what was created or changed; ensure output is marked generated.
